Schnittstelle PluginRepository

Alle bekannten Implementierungsklassen:
FileRepository
public interface PluginRepository

Abstraction of a storage for plugin data.

A repository handles the persistence of plugin binaries and provides access to their contents via InputStream suppliers.

Seit:
1.0.0

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    boolean
    contains(@NonNull PluginId pluginId)
    @NonNull Set<PluginId>
    plugins()
    void
    remove(@NonNull PluginId pluginId)
    @NonNull Supplier<InputStream>
    retrieve(@NonNull PluginId pluginId)
    void
    store(@NonNull PluginId pluginId, @NonNull Supplier<InputStream> inputStreamSupplier)

  • Methodendetails

    • store

      void store(@NonNull PluginId pluginId, @NonNull Supplier<InputStream> inputStreamSupplier) throws PluginRepositoryException

      Stores a plugin's data in the repository.

      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      inputStreamSupplier - the Supplier providing the JAR content as an InputStream; must not be null
      Löst aus:
      PluginRepositoryException - if the plugin could not be stored
      NullPointerException - if pluginId or inputStreamSupplier is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • retrieve

      @NonNull Supplier<InputStream> retrieve(@NonNull PluginId pluginId) throws PluginRepositoryException

      Retrieves a plugin's data from the repository.

      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a Supplier for the plugin's JAR as an InputStream
      Löst aus:
      PluginRepositoryException - if the plugin could not be retrieved
      NullPointerException - if pluginId is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • contains

      boolean contains(@NonNull PluginId pluginId)

      Checks if a plugin with the specified ID is stored in the repository.

      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the plugin is present, false otherwise
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if pluginId is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • remove

      void remove(@NonNull PluginId pluginId) throws PluginRepositoryException

      Removes a plugin from the repository.

      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      Löst aus:
      PluginRepositoryException - if the plugin could not be removed
      NullPointerException - if pluginId is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • plugins

      @NonNull Set<PluginId> plugins()

      Returns a set of all plugin identifiers currently stored in the repository.

      Gibt zurück:
      an unmodifiable set of PluginIds
      Seit:
      1.0.0
